Our employees around the globe are here to accelerate service providers’ migration to the cloud, enable them to differentiate in the 5G era, and digitalize and automate their operations. Listed on the NASDAQ Global Select Market, Amdocs had revenue of $5\\.00 billion in fiscal 2024\\. For more information, visit www.amdocs.com
   

  

 At Amdocs, our mission is to empower our employees to 'Live Amazing, Do Amazing' every day. We believe in creating a workplace where you not only excel professionally but also thrive personally. Through our culture of making a real impact, fostering growth, embracing flexibility, and building connections, we enable them to live meaningful lives while making a difference in the world.
   

  

**In one sentence**
 The Developers work on problems of diverse scope where analysis of data requires evaluation of identifiable factors. Strong knowledge of C\\# technologies, as well as debugging code, is a must\\-have. Demonstrates good judgment in selecting methods and techniques for obtaining solutions—networks with senior internal and external personnel in own area of expertise. The developer has to work on the migration efforts of critical, industry\\-class, in\\-house, or commercial products as well as tooling for use in project work.
   

  

**What will your job look like?**
* Expert level C\\# knowledge and debugging.
* Help keep C\\# libraries in sync by porting code from C\\#, or vice versa.
* Extend runtime C\\# libraries with new functionality, which typically is re\\-implementing functionality found in legacy systems, but now in a C\\# environment
* C\\# Fundamentals expertise with hands\\-on experience is a must
* Help create custom plugins for existing tools, to help with project\\-specific needs
* In\\-depth understanding of object\\-oriented concepts
* Willing to work in both Java and C\\# (50%\\-50%)

* Deliver within the scope of the project, within the scope of a Factory project, while not compromising on quality.
* Work closely with team members and clients to achieve desired results.
* Thrive in an environment of collaboration and change.
* Mentor junior team members on Mainframe migration
* Identify and bridge the knowledge gap among team members from different backgrounds, like C\\#, Mainframe, etc.
* Profile the migrated application to detect any performance problems and improvements in the C\\# code, or in the support libraries used by this code
* Expert database development knowledge.
* SQL development
* Understanding of database concepts
* Ability to create/maintain database objects
* Query tuning
* Database locking
* Thrive in an environment of collaboration and change.
* Learn the Astadia Factory tools to perform mainframe transformations
* A plus for the role is some experience with mainframe application technologies (COBOL, CICS, DB2, etc.), and the ability to understand the transformation from a legacy code set to a modern code set
* Experienced in unit testing, test\\-driven development, integration testing, and deployment using cloud technologies
* Scripts/Python development experience will be an advantage


**All you need is...**
* BE in Computer Science or equivalent work experience.
* 5\\+ Years of Development professional experience in NET/C\\# experience
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills
* Need to know differences between .NET Framework and .NET (core), C\\# 8 – 13
* Interest in learning about legacy technologies, as the libraries typically implement functions available in these legacy technologies
* Certifications in any cloud technologies.
* Experience with Waterfall and Agile Development Methodologies.
* Strong object\\-oriented programming and debugging skills.
* SQL development
* Willing to learn Mainframe Technologies (COBOL, CICS, JCL, DB2, etc)


**Why You Will Love This Job**
* You will be challenged to design and develop new software applications.
* You will have the opportunity to work in a growing organization, with ever growing opportunities for personal growth.


**Amdocs is an equal opportunity employer. We welcome applicants from all backgrounds and are committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workforce**

title: SW Engineer (1-2 years experience - Java, JavaScript, SQL, Spring Boot, Python, and NoSQL Database)
description:
Visa is a world leader in payments technology, facilitating transactions between consumers, merchants, financial institutions and government entities across more than 200 countries and territories, dedicated to uplifting everyone, everywhere by being the best way to pay and be paid.
   

  





 At Visa, you'll have the opportunity to create impact at scale — tackling meaningful challenges, growing your skills and seeing your contributions impact lives around the world. Join Visa and do work that matters — to you, to your community, and to the world.
   

  





 Progress starts with you.
   

  

  

  




**Job Description**

 Visa’s Technology Organization is a collaborative community of problem solvers and innovators dedicated to reshaping the future of commerce. We operate the world’s most sophisticated processing networks as the leader in digital payments, supporting up to 65,000 secure transactions per second across a global network of over 100 million merchant locations and nearly 15,000 financial institutions, empowering billions of cardholders worldwide.
   

  





 The Opportunity:
   

  





 We are looking for dedicated, curious, and energetic Software Engineers who embrace solving complex challenges on a global scale. As a Associate Software Engineer at Product Reliability Engineering team, you will be an integral part of a multi\\-functional full stack engineering team inventing, designing, building, and testing agentic solutions and software products that will operate at global scale to predict and prevent real time reliability challenges in a rapidly evolving technology environment at Visa’s scale. You will get to see how your efforts shaping the digital future of fintech transactions and ensuring a reliability of 99\\.9999% and beyond.
   

  





 The Work itself:
   

  




* Build Agentic Solutions using world’s most advanced LLM models from Anthropic, OpenAI and others
* Build Deep Learning solutions using AI/ML Platforms for real time transactions at a scale of 100K\\+ TPS and for peta bytes of Data.
* Design code and systems that touch 40% of the world population while influencing Visa’s internal standards for scalability, security, and reusability
* Collaborate multi\\-functionally to create design artifacts and develop best\\-in\\-class software solutions for Visa’s commercial products and services.
* Actively contributes to product reliability improvements, valuable service technology, and new operations flows in diverse agile squads
* Opportunities to make a difference on a global or local scale through mentorship and continued learning and experiments.



 Essential Functions:
   

  




* Demonstrates in\\-depth technical proficiency to accurately interpret and address project requirements.
* Identifies and contributes to the development and solution strategies to team members that improve the design and functionality of interface features across one or more project features, under minimal guidance.
* Collaborates with others to support the piloting of new technology capabilities and features that enhance the customer experience across commercial products.
* Supports ongoing innovation by developing scalable, maintainable, and efficient systems aligned with organizational objectives and global technology standards.



 This is a hybrid position. Expectation of days in office will be confirmed by your hiring manager.
   

  

  

  




**Qualifications**

 Basic Qualifications:
   

  

 Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science, or related technology/engineering discipline.
   

  

  

  

 Preferred Qualifications:
   

  

 1\\-2 years of work experience with a Bachelor’s degree or Advanced Degree (e.g. Masters, MBA, JD, MD) in Computer Science, or related technology/engineering discipline.
   

  

 Exposure in developing agentic solutions using Cline, Claude, GitHub Copilot, Power Automate etc.
   

  

 Experience in Software Development with Agile and full SDLC using programming languages such as (e.g., Java, GO, Python, Scala, Java scripts, .Net) etc.
   

  

 Development experience in building and using Microservices with HTTP, REST, JSON.
   

  

 Experience with a Relational database and/or NoSQL database.
   

  

 Proficient in GIT/Stash, Maven and Jenkins.
   

  

 Exposure in streaming platform like Kafka.
   

  

 Exposure with tools development, automation (CI/CD, Auto Deployment, System Availability, etc.), logging and monitoring.
   

  

 Knowledge of large scale data analytics and statistical modelling.
   

  

 Strong analytical, problem solving and communication skills.
   

  

  

  

 The Skills You Bring:
   

  

 Energy and Experience: A growth mindset that is curious and passionate about technologies and enjoys challenging projects on a global scale
   

  

 Challenge the Status Quo: Comfort in pushing the boundaries, ‘hacking’ beyond traditional solutions
   

  

 Language Expertise: Expertise in anyone programing language (e.g., Java, C\\#, C\\+\\+, GO, Python, Scala, Java scripts, .Net)
   

  

 Builder: Experience building and deploying modern services and web applications with quality and scalability
   

  

 Learner: Constant drive to learn new technologies such as coding with GenAI, new backend, front\\-end, test and devops technologies.
   

  

 Partnership: Experience collaborating with Product, Test, Dev\\-ops, and Agile/Scrum teams
   

  

  

  




**Additional Information**

 Visa is an EEO Employer. Qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability or protected veteran status. Visa will also consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories in a manner consistent with EEOC guidelines and applicable local law.

We prefer the word ‘partner’ over ‘vendor’, and our investment in professional relationships is a reflection of that philosophy. You will play a pivotal role in connecting our AI assistants to our internal systems.

 applications.
 



 ● Advanced programming experience with Typescript, Python, or Go, including
 



 Microservice, REST, open API specs, and Integration design.
 



 ● Strong knowledge and experience with configuration management tools and
 



 Infrastructure as Code methods, such as Terraform, Ansible, Chef, etc.
 



 ● Strong knowledge and experience with build\\-deploy pipeline development and best
 



 practices in tools like GitLab or GitHub.
 



 ● Experience and expertise in Agile methodology.
 



 ● Excellent interpersonal and communication skills in written and spoken English.
 



 ● Prior experience working on enterprise MCP engineering teams.
 



  





 Avenue Code reinforces its commitment to privacy and to all the principles guaranteed by the most accurate global data protection laws, such as GDPR, LGPD, CCPA and CPRA. The Candidate data shared with Avenue Code will be kept confidential and will not be transmitted to disinterested third parties, nor will it be used for purposes other than the application for open positions. title: Lead/ Sr. Software Engineer
description:

Founded by a team of Stanford researchers and entrepreneurs with deep industry experience, Sanas has developed the world’s first real\\-time speech transformation platform capable of accent translation, noise elimination, speech enhancement, and cross\\-language communication.
   

  

 Sanas makes conversations clearer, more inclusive, and more effective, removing barriers that prevent people from being understood, regardless of accent, background noise, or native language.
   

  

 Since going to market in 2023, Sanas has scaled at an extraordinary pace, growing from $0 to $32M ARR in under two years, with a projected \\>$50M ARR by the end of 2025\\. The company recently recorded its first $10M quarter and is on track to achieve $120M in ARR next year.
   

  

 The company’s valuation has a clear trajectory toward multi\\-billion\\-dollar market capitalization as it continues to expand into new verticals and product categories. With a TAM that spans all human in the loop communications and beyond, Sanas has the potential to impact every industry and every global interaction.
   

  

 Sanas is revolutionizing the way we communicate with the world’s first real\\-time algorithm, designed to modulate accents, eliminate background noises, and magnify speech clarity. Pioneered by seasoned startup founders with a proven track record of creating and steering multiple unicorn companies, our groundbreaking GDP\\-shifting technology sets a gold standard.
   

  

 Sanas is a 200\\-strong team, established in 2020\\. In this short span, we’ve successfully secured over $100 million in funding. Our innovation has been supported by the industry’s leading investors, including Insight Partners, Google Ventures, Quadrille Capital, General Catalyst, Quiet Capital, and other influential investors. Our reputation is further solidified by collaborations with numerous Fortune 100 companies. With Sanas, you’re not just adopting a product; you’re investing in the future of communication.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled and experienced Staff Software Engineer to play a pivotal role in the development and evolution of our flagship desktop application. You will leverage your deep expertise in C\\+\\+, Flutter, and RESTful API integration to contribute to the design, implementation, and optimization of key features across our SDK and frontend. This role offers an exciting opportunity to tackle complex technical challenges and make significant contributions to a high\\-impact product.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Contribute to the architectural design and implementation of the desktop application, focusing on the C\\+\\+ SDK, Flutter frontend, and their interaction with backend systems via REST APIs.
* Design, develop, and maintain high\\-quality components and features within the C\\+\\+ SDK.

* Implement and integrate with RESTful APIs to communicate with backend services (Authentication, PostgreSQL, Clickhouse, etc.).
* Ensure the performance, reliability, and scalability of the application components you contribute to.
* Write comprehensive unit and integration tests to ensure code quality.
* Participate actively in code reviews, providing and receiving constructive feedback.
* Troubleshoot and debug complex issues spanning the frontend, SDK, and backend interactions.
* Collaborate closely with other engineers, architects, and product managers to deliver high\\-quality software.
* Contribute to technical documentation and knowledge sharing within the team.
* Mentor and guide junior engineers on technical best practices.
* Stay up\\-to\\-date with the latest advancements in C\\+\\+, Flutter, and related technologies.


**Must Have Qualifications**
* Bachelor's or Master's degree in Computer Science or a related field.
* Substantial experience (8\\-12 years) in software development.
* Deep expertise in at least one of the core areas: C\\+\\+ development (including SDKs), Flutter frontend development, or RESTful API integration.
* Strong understanding of software development principles, design patterns, and best practices.
* Shell or Python Scripting: For build automation, system\\-level debugging, and deployment.

title: Senior Engineer - Controls Engineer / System Integrator
description:
**Requisition ID:** 
 70729
   

  

**About Whirlpool India**
 Whirlpool of India Limited, headquartered in Gurugram, is a leading home appliances company dedicated to enhancing life at home and inspiring generations through its trusted brands. The company operates three state\\-of\\-the\\-art manufacturing facilities in Faridabad, Pune \\& Puducherry, each reflecting Whirlpool’s commitment to providing best\\-in\\-class consumer solutions. Further driving innovation, the company has a Technology \\& Engineering Center, where India's world\\-class talent architects the next generation of home innovation. In the 2024\\-25 fiscal year, Whirlpool of India reported approximately INR 8110 Cr in annual revenue and employed 2193 people. More information is available at www.india.whirlpool.in
   

  

**The Team You Will Be a Part Of**
 The Engineering team discovers, develops and evaluates new product ideas, enhancements, or strategic product extensions, and translates research discoveries into usable and marketable products. Leads, plans and tracks all phases of the product life cycle, from inception to introduction into the marketplace. Coordinates with various functions to ensure successful product development and implementation.
   

  

**This Role In Summary**
 A System Integrator or Controls engineer in Electrical and Electronic Systems (EES) is a professional who specializes in integrating electrical and electronic components and systems specifically for home appliances. This role focuses on designing, implementing, and optimizing the electrical and electronic systems that power and control various home appliances, such as refrigerators, washing machines, dishwashers, ovens, and more. This role would involve developing and programming control systems and user interfaces for the appliances, enabling users to interact with and operate the appliances with ease.
   

  

 This may include designing intuitive control panels, integrating touch screens or digital displays, and implementing smart features and connectivity options for remote control or integration with smart home systems. A System Integrator or Controls engineer is going to work closely with a team of engineers, designers, and technicians to understand the functional requirements of the home appliances and translate them into effective system architectures. System Integrator or Controls engineer would be responsible for selecting and integrating the appropriate electrical and electronic components, such as hardware, software, wire harnesses, sensors, actuators, and communication interfaces, to ensure seamless operatio and optimal performance of the appliances.
   

  

 Throughout the Whirlpool Development Process (WPD), System Integrator or Controls engineer would collaborate with cross\\-functional teams to ensure compliance with industry standards, safety regulations, and energy efficiency requirements.
   

  

 System Integrator or Controls engineer would conduct testing and troubleshooting activities to identify and resolve any electrical or electronic issues, ensuring that the appliances meet high\\-quality standards and deliver a positive user experience. In summary, a System Integrator or Controls engineer in Electric and Electronic Systems applied in home appliances is a skilled professional who leverages their expertise in electrical and electronic engineering to integrate and optimize the systems powering home appliances. By collaborating with diverse teams, they contribute to the development of reliable, user\\-friendly, and technologically advanced home appliances that enhance the consumer's life at home
   

  

**Your Responsibilities Will Include**
**Key Activities and Responsibilities:**
* Manage system integration of projects in Production Development Projects.
* Work with system architects to have a better hand shake from G0 (planning) to Execution starting at G1
* Support arch to Decompose product level requirements generation with Target ranges in DNG for EES System and alignment with stakeholders.
* Support Architects and Project Managers on project scoping work, aligning right cost, quality target and schedule (IDP) with stakeholders before project is initiated
* Accountable to Drive EES integration events since project initiation.
* Support on Platform integration event
* Ensure with the support of PM , product development activities are completed On time, Cost and Quality
* Performance targets to support the project plans and project execution.
* Responsible for EES system level design trade\\-offs and technical decision making for issue resolution within the project/product plan guardrails.
* Lead technical design reviews / Integration Even for project to provide an assessment of whether the project is within the architecture/project/product plan guardrails by working with key development team members (e.g. Subsystem teams, V\\&V Engineer, Project Leader) and by consulting with key architecture development team members when necessary (e.g. System Architect, Subsystem SMEs, V\\&V Strategist)
* Responsibility to Drive \\& tracking the closure of Risk Management and Knowledge Gap by partnering with stakeholders.
* Responsible to drive EES system validation through use of predictive validation methodologies in concept, design and product validation stages
* Responsible for driving Product Leadership through the Whirlpool Product Development process at the EES system Level.
* Responsible to drive the adherence of EES APQP and Support project APQP.
* Responsibility to Ensure variant\\-specific engineering bills of material (EBOMs) have proper configuration management and align to project charter and architecture definition
* Drive closure of EES System level dFMEA, based on Concept and Design Validation data and functional performance stacks.
* Drive closure of EES Subsystems dFMEA based on Concept and Design Validation data and functional performance stacks.
* Define parts will be needed for the builds, number of samples and dates required
* Align expenses, write POs and track the parts for builds and make sure they arrive on time
* Review test cases based on consumer use cases results are completed and approved as per the project plan with EES V\\&V Engineer , EES Subsystem, Platform Subsystem , Setting file Engineer, Platform SI
* Partner with the Systems Architect and Subsystem Engineers to ensure requirements are consistent, complete and approved as per the project plan
* Drive Subsystem Engineer \\& ECAD team for processing the Design package releases and control.
* Technical Support the Change Management (IOCs, significant scope changes) along with the PM , Depending on Project Scope Changes, that impact significantly Cost, Schedule or Resources, understand the impact of changes and build trade\\-off/selection material do decide approve/not approve IOC.


**Minimum Requirements**
* Education:
+ BE or BS , ME or MS degree in Electrical or electronics or instrumentation Engineering, Power Electronics \\& Drives
+ Electrical Engineering or Controls and Automation Engineer or another electrical related Degree

* 5 years project Engineering \\& Technical Design Experience or Post Graduation in relevant domain.
* Proven New Product development and execution experience in electrical and electronics related product.
* System Integration capabilities, Critical Systems Thinker
* Knowledge in given Product Platform (Refrigeration, Laundry, etc)
* Project management
* System design \\& system Integration
* Requirements Management
* Strong Electrical system background, including EMC Theory and Practice and Electrical Stack\\-up capability
* Base level: Exceptional problem solving approach with OPEX certification
* English Fluent level (Listen, Write and Speak in English is mandatory for the position);
* Good balance of technical and project management skills;
* Good communication skills


**Preferred Skills And Experiences**
 To excel in the role of a System Integrator in Electrical and Electronic Systems applied in home appliances, the following experience and skills are valuable:
   

  

* Understanding of electrical and electronic engineering principles, including circuit design, power systems, digital electronics, hardware, software and sensor technologies;
* Problem\\-solving skills;
* Collaboration skill to work within a multidisciplinary team, including engineers, designers, and technicians;
* Ability to work in a fast\\-paced environment with shifting priorities and tight deadlines;
* Effective time management skills to ensure timely completion of tasks and projects.
* Ability to use basic AI tools and knowledge to use to solve and demonstrate the solutions.


**What We Offer**
 N/A
   

  

 Connect with us and learn more about Whirlpool India.
   

  

 See what it's like to work at Whirlpool by visiting Whirlpool Careers. Additional information about the company can be found on Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram and YouTube.
   

  

 At Whirlpool India, we value and celebrate diversity.
